<<<KOT:megapode>>>>
{"kind":"molecule","gloss":"a {urn:molecule-v0:bird|bird} [m] of one kind; it is big; it has two parts for moving that are very big; people see one in wooded places; it does not sit on its {urn:molecule-v0:egg|eggs} [m]; instead, it puts them in a place where there is decaying things or heat from the ground or from the {urn:molecule-v0:sun|sun} [m]; the {urn:molecule-v0:egg|eggs} [m] become warm there; after some time, very mature {urn:molecule-v0:bird|birds} [m] of one kind come out","groundingRefs":["urn:molecule-v0:bird","urn:molecule-v0:sun"]}
<<<END:megapode>>>>

<<<KOT:miasmic>>>>
{"kind":"molecule","gloss":"full of bad things in the air that are not good for someone who is alive; it is like bad air or bad vapors; when someone breathes this, they can become not good","groundingRefs":[]}
<<<END:miasmic>>>>

<<<KOT:mitochondrion>>>>
{"kind":"cannot-formalise","why":"a mitochondrion is a subcellular organelle whose defining features—double-membrane structure, aerobic respiration, ATP synthesis, genetic material independent of the host nucleus—belong to molecular biology and biochemistry. These identity conditions cannot be expressed in the prime lexicon or in terms of the everyday sensory, kinship, artefact, or place categories that ground the Kernel of Truth. It requires technical biology."}
<<<END:mitochondrion>>>>

<<<KOT:motivative>>>>
{"kind":"cannot-formalise","why":"the dominant sense here is grammatical: a morphological case marking in Basque and other languages that expresses 'because of'. This is a purely linguistic-technical term with no grounding in material things, actions, percepts, kinship, places, or bodily states. It belongs to the linguistics/grammar domain, not the everyday conceptual layer of the Kernel of Truth."}
<<<END:motivative>>>>
